evals.prompt: Write a 4-email cold outreach sequence for our SaaS analytics tool targeting VP of Marketing at B2B SaaS companies with 50-200 employees.
evals.expected_output: Should load product-marketing-context.md first. Should write 4 emails following the sequence structure: Opening (Day 1), Value Add (Day 3-4), Different Angle (Day 7-8), Breakup (Day 14-21). Each email should have a subject line, body under 150 words, and a specific low-friction ask. First email should not start with 'I' and should be about the prospect. Should include send day and purpose note for each email.
assertions: First email does not open with 'I'
Each email has a subject line
Each email has a low-friction ask
